---
title: "吉田山の里山の会 植樹木マップ"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    css: assets/tree-map.css
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css">
        <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js" defer></script>
        <script src="assets/tree-map.js" defer></script>
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| results: asis

sheet_id <- Sys.getenv(
  "TREE_SHEET_ID",
  unset = "1IQr-S0WZLd33h045z6eAyrtxiXQqPvbpR--ndn9mHUk"
)

csv_url <- sprintf(
  "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/%s/gviz/tq?tqx=out:csv&gid=0",
  sheet_id
)

trees <- suppressWarnings(utils::read.csv(
  csv_url,
  fileEncoding = "UTF-8",
  check.names = FALSE,
  na.strings = c("", "NA")
))

required_columns <- c(
  "record_id", "species_ja", "species_scientific",
  "latitude", "longitude", "publish", "year", "note"
)
missing_columns <- setdiff(required_columns, names(trees))
if (length(missing_columns)) {
  stop("Spreadsheetに必要な列がありません: ", paste(missing_columns, collapse = ", "))
}

is_public <- tolower(trimws(as.character(trees$publish))) %in%
  c("true", "1", "yes")
trees <- trees[is_public, required_columns, drop = FALSE]
trees$latitude <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(trees$latitude))
trees$longitude <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(trees$longitude))
trees <- trees[
  is.finite(trees$latitude) & is.finite(trees$longitude),
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

if (!nrow(trees)) {
  stop("公開対象で、有効な緯度・経度を持つ立木データがありません。")
}

tree_json <- jsonlite::toJSON(
  trees,
  dataframe = "rows",
  auto_unbox = TRUE,
  na = "null"
)
tree_json <- gsub("</", "<\\/", tree_json, fixed = TRUE)

cat(
  '<div id="tree-map" role="region" ',
  'aria-label="吉田山の立木位置図" ',
  'aria-describedby="tree-map-summary"></div>\n',
  sep = ""
)
cat(
  sprintf(
    '<p id="tree-map-summary" class="tree-map-summary">公開対象の立木 %d件を表示しています。マーカーを選択すると詳細を確認できます。</p>\n',
    nrow(trees)
  )
)
cat(
  '<script id="tree-map-data" type="application/json">',
  tree_json,
  '</script>\n',
  sep = ""
)
```
